targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as "Online" FROM station_connectivity sc WHERE sc.is_online = true AND sc.sid NOT IN (SELECT sid FROM stations WHERE station_status IS NOT NULL OR health_check IS NOT NULL)
SELECT COUNT(*) as "Offline" FROM station_connectivity sc WHERE sc.is_online = false AND sc.sid NOT IN (SELECT sid FROM stations WHERE station_status IS NOT NULL OR health_check IS NOT NULL)
SELECT COUNT(*) as "Critical" FROM station_data_flow_status WHERE health_status = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) as "Control Down" FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE control_open = false AND is_online = true AND station_status IS NULL AND health_check IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Missing Raw"
FROM station_dashboard_data d
JOIN station_data_flow_status f ON f.sid = d.station_id
WHERE d.is_online = true
  AND d.station_status IS NULL
  AND d.health_check IS NULL
  AND f.status_24h = 2

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Missing RINEX"
FROM station_dashboard_data d
JOIN station_data_flow_status f ON f.sid = d.station_id
WHERE d.is_online = true
  AND d.station_status IS NULL
  AND d.health_check IS NULL
  AND f.status_24h = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Volt Warn" FROM station_dashboard_data d JOIN stations s ON s.sid = d.station_id WHERE d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL AND d.voltage IS NOT NULL AND (d.status_details LIKE '%Voltage%' OR (d.is_online = false AND ((COALESCE(s.power_type, 'battery') = 'battery' AND (d.voltage < 11.8 OR d.voltage > 15.0)) OR (s.power_type = 'dcdc' AND (d.voltage < 12.0 OR d.voltage > 16.5)) OR (s.power_type = 'dcdc24' AND (d.voltage < 20.0 OR d.voltage > 28.0)) OR (s.power_type = 'mains' AND (d.voltage < 15.0 OR d.voltage > 25.0)))))

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Stations with Stalls"
FROM download_log
WHERE outcome = 'stall_timeout'
  AND ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

panels.description: Click station to view details. Click "Full Map" link above for larger view.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  d.station_id AS sid,
  d.latitude,
  d.longitude,
  d.overall_status,
  CASE
    WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL THEN 0
    WHEN d.overall_status = 'healthy' THEN 3
    WHEN d.overall_status = 'warning' THEN 2
    WHEN d.overall_status = 'critical' THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END AS status_code,
  d.receiver_type,
  d.connection_status,
  CASE
    WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL THEN d.station_status
    WHEN d.health_check = 'passive' THEN 'passive'
    WHEN d.connection_state IS NULL THEN 'unknown'
    WHEN d.connection_state = 'online' THEN 'online ' || format_duration(d.state_duration)
    WHEN d.connection_state = 'degraded' THEN 'degraded ' || format_duration(d.state_duration)
    ELSE 'offline ' || format_duration(d.state_duration)
  END AS conn,
  d.voltage,
  d.temperature,
  d.satellites_tracked,
  d.disk_usage_pct,
  d.ntrip_status,
  d.seconds_since_update,
  d.status_details,
  CASE
    WHEN f.status_24h = 0 THEN 3
    WHEN f.status_24h = 1 THEN 2
    WHEN f.status_24h = 2 THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END AS data_status_code
FROM station_dashboard_data d
LEFT JOIN station_data_flow_status f ON f.sid = d.station_id
LEFT JOIN stations s ON s.sid = d.station_id
WHERE d.latitude IS NOT NULL
  AND d.longitude IS NOT NULL
  AND ('$area' = 'all' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM station_area_members sam WHERE sam.sid = d.station_id AND sam.area_id = '$area'))
  AND (${station:singlequote} = 'all' OR d.station_id = ${station:singlequote})
  AND (${receiver:singlequote} = 'all' OR (${receiver:singlequote} = 'NONE' AND d.receiver_type IS NULL) OR d.receiver_type = ${receiver:singlequote})
  AND (${antenna:singlequote} = 'all' OR (${antenna:singlequote} = 'NONE' AND d.antenna_type IS NULL) OR d.antenna_type = ${antenna:singlequote})
  AND (${owner:singlequote} = 'all' OR s.station_owner = ${owner:singlequote})
  AND ('$status_filter' = 'all'
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'online' AND d.is_online = true AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'offline' AND d.is_online = false AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'critical' AND d.overall_status = 'critical' AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'warning' AND d.overall_status = 'warning' AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'ping_failed' AND d.status_details LIKE '%Ping%' AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'ftp_down' AND d.ftp_open = false AND d.is_online = true AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'ctrl_refused' AND d.control_open = false AND d.is_online = true)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'disk_warning' AND d.status_details LIKE '%Disk%' AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'discontinued' AND d.station_status = 'discontinued')
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'passive' AND d.health_check = 'passive')
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'inactive' AND d.station_status = 'inactive')
    OR ('$status_filter' = '24hr_rinex_missing' AND d.is_online = true AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL
        AND f.status_24h = 1)
    OR ('$status_filter' = '1hr_rinex_missing' AND f.status_1hz = 2 AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = '24hr_raw_missing' AND d.is_online = true AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL
        AND f.status_24h = 2)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'voltage_warning' AND d.voltage IS NOT NULL AND (d.status_details LIKE '%Voltage%' OR (d.is_online = false AND ((COALESCE(s.power_type, 'battery') = 'battery' AND (d.voltage < 11.8 OR d.voltage > 15.0)) OR (s.power_type = 'dcdc' AND (d.voltage < 12.0 OR d.voltage > 16.5)) OR (s.power_type = 'dcdc24' AND (d.voltage < 20.0 OR d.voltage > 28.0)) OR (s.power_type = 'mains' AND (d.voltage < 15.0 OR d.voltage > 25.0))))))
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'stall' AND d.station_id IN (SELECT sid FROM download_log WHERE outcome = 'stall_timeout' AND ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()))
  )
  AND ('$status_filter' IN ('discontinued', 'inactive') OR d.station_status IS NULL)
ORDER BY d.station_id

panels.title: Station Map - $area

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  d.station_id AS "Station",
  s.station_owner AS "Agency",
  d.receiver_type AS "Receiver",
  d.antenna_type AS "Antenna",
  CASE WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE f.combined_status END AS "Status",
  CASE WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL OR d.health_check IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE d.voltage END AS "Voltage",
  CASE WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE f.status_24h END AS "Data",
  CASE WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE f.health_status END AS "Health",
  d.seconds_since_update AS "Checked",
  CASE
    WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL OR d.health_check IS NOT NULL THEN 'N/A'
    WHEN d.connection_state IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN d.connection_state = 'online' THEN 'online ' || format_duration(d.state_duration)
    WHEN d.connection_state = 'degraded' THEN 'degraded ' || format_duration(d.state_duration)
    ELSE 'offline ' || format_duration(d.state_duration)
  END AS "Conn",
  CASE WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL OR d.health_check IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE d.packet_loss END AS "Loss",
  CASE
    WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL OR d.health_check IS NOT NULL THEN 'N/A'
    WHEN d.ftp_open IS NULL AND d.http_open IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN COALESCE(d.ftp_open, true) AND COALESCE(d.http_open, true) THEN 'active'
    WHEN d.ftp_open = false THEN
      CASE WHEN d.status_details LIKE '%FTP refused%' THEN 'dl:refused'
           WHEN d.status_details LIKE '%FTP timeout%' THEN 'dl:timeout'
           ELSE 'dl:down' END
    WHEN d.http_open = false THEN
      CASE WHEN d.status_details LIKE '%HTTP refused%' THEN 'hc:refused'
           WHEN d.status_details LIKE '%HTTP timeout%' THEN 'hc:timeout'
           ELSE 'hc:down' END
    ELSE 'unknown'
  END AS "Port",
  CASE WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL OR d.health_check IS NOT NULL THEN 'N/A' ELSE d.ntrip_status END AS "NTRIP",
  CASE WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL OR d.health_check IS NOT NULL THEN NULL WHEN d.is_online = false THEN NULL WHEN d.receiver_type = 'NetR5' THEN -1 ELSE d.satellites_tracked END AS "Sats",
  CASE WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE f.rinex_24h_status END AS "24h Data",
  CASE WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE f.status_1hz END AS "1Hz Data",
  dl.avg_speed_bps AS "Avg Speed",
  dl.stalls AS "Stalls",
  CASE WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL OR d.health_check IS NOT NULL THEN NULL WHEN d.is_online = false THEN NULL ELSE d.uptime_seconds END AS "Uptime",
  d.stall_timeout_override AS "Timeout Override"
FROM station_dashboard_data d
LEFT JOIN station_data_flow_status f ON f.sid = d.station_id
LEFT JOIN stations s ON s.sid = d.station_id
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT
    AVG(avg_speed_bps)::bigint AS avg_speed_bps,
    SUM(CASE WHEN outcome = 'stall_timeout' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::integer AS stalls
  FROM download_log
  WHERE download_log.sid = d.station_id
    AND ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
) dl ON true
WHERE ('$area' = 'all' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM station_area_members sam WHERE sam.sid = d.station_id AND sam.area_id = '$area'))
  AND (${station:singlequote} = 'all' OR d.station_id = ${station:singlequote})
  AND (${receiver:singlequote} = 'all' OR (${receiver:singlequote} = 'NONE' AND d.receiver_type IS NULL) OR d.receiver_type = ${receiver:singlequote})
  AND (${antenna:singlequote} = 'all' OR (${antenna:singlequote} = 'NONE' AND d.antenna_type IS NULL) OR d.antenna_type = ${antenna:singlequote})
  AND (${owner:singlequote} = 'all' OR s.station_owner = ${owner:singlequote})
  AND ('$status_filter' = 'all'
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'online' AND d.is_online = true AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'offline' AND d.is_online = false AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'critical' AND f.combined_status = 2 AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'warning' AND f.combined_status = 1 AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'ping_failed' AND d.status_details LIKE '%Ping%' AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'ftp_down' AND d.ftp_open = false AND d.is_online = true AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'ctrl_refused' AND d.control_open = false AND d.is_online = true AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'disk_warning' AND d.status_details LIKE '%Disk%' AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'discontinued' AND d.station_status = 'discontinued')
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'passive' AND d.health_check = 'passive')
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'inactive' AND d.station_status = 'inactive')
    OR ('$status_filter' = '24hr_rinex_missing' AND d.is_online = true AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL
        AND f.status_24h = 1)
    OR ('$status_filter' = '1hr_rinex_missing' AND f.status_1hz = 2 AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = '24hr_raw_missing' AND d.is_online = true AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL
        AND f.status_24h = 2)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'voltage_warning' AND d.voltage IS NOT NULL AND (d.status_details LIKE '%Voltage%' OR (d.is_online = false AND ((COALESCE(s.power_type, 'battery') = 'battery' AND (d.voltage < 11.8 OR d.voltage > 15.0)) OR (s.power_type = 'dcdc' AND (d.voltage < 12.0 OR d.voltage > 16.5)) OR (s.power_type = 'dcdc24' AND (d.voltage < 20.0 OR d.voltage > 28.0)) OR (s.power_type = 'mains' AND (d.voltage < 15.0 OR d.voltage > 25.0))))))
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'stall' AND d.station_id IN (SELECT sid FROM download_log WHERE outcome = 'stall_timeout' AND ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()))
  )
  AND ('$status_filter' IN ('discontinued', 'inactive') OR d.station_status IS NULL)
ORDER BY d.station_id

WITH last_voltage AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (sid) sid, voltage
  FROM block_power_status
  WHERE voltage IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY sid, ts DESC
)
SELECT
  d.station_id AS "Station",
  CASE
    WHEN f.health_status = 2 THEN d.status_details
    WHEN lv.voltage IS NOT NULL AND lv.voltage < 5.0 THEN 'power failure (' || round(lv.voltage::numeric, 1) || 'V)'
    WHEN lv.voltage IS NOT NULL AND lv.voltage < 11.0 THEN 'low voltage (' || round(lv.voltage::numeric, 1) || 'V)'
    WHEN lv.voltage IS NOT NULL AND lv.voltage < 11.8 THEN 'battery low (' || round(lv.voltage::numeric, 1) || 'V)'
    WHEN lv.voltage IS NOT NULL THEN 'connection lost'
    ELSE 'unreachable'
  END AS "Cause",
  d.packet_loss AS "Loss",
  COALESCE(d.voltage, lv.voltage) AS "Voltage",
  CASE
    WHEN f.health_status = 2 THEN 'critical'
    WHEN d.connection_state = 'degraded' THEN 'degraded'
    ELSE 'offline'
  END AS "State",
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM d.state_duration)::integer AS "Duration",
  d.last_check AS "Last Update"
FROM station_dashboard_data d
LEFT JOIN station_data_flow_status f ON f.sid = d.station_id
LEFT JOIN last_voltage lv ON lv.sid = d.station_id
WHERE (f.health_status = 2 OR (d.is_online = false AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL))
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN f.health_status = 2 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
  d.station_id

SELECT
  d.station_id AS "Station",
  d.status_details AS "Cause",
  d.packet_loss AS "Loss",
  d.voltage AS "Voltage",
  d.last_check AS "Last Update"
FROM station_dashboard_data d
JOIN station_data_flow_status f ON f.sid = d.station_id
WHERE f.health_status = 1
ORDER BY d.station_id

SELECT
  p.ts AS time,
  p.sid AS metric,
  p.voltage AS value
FROM block_power_status p
JOIN stations s ON s.sid = p.sid
WHERE $__timeFilter(p.ts)
  AND ('$area' = 'all' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM station_area_members sam WHERE sam.sid = p.sid AND sam.area_id = '$area'))
  AND (${owner:singlequote} = 'all' OR s.station_owner = ${owner:singlequote})
  AND COALESCE(s.power_type, 'battery') = 'battery'
ORDER BY p.ts

list.definition: SELECT 'all' AS __value, 'All Stations' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT area_id AS __value, area_name || ' (' || area_type || ')' AS __text FROM station_areas ORDER BY __text
list.label: Area
list.name: area
list.query: SELECT 'all' AS __value, 'All Stations' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT area_id AS __value, area_name || ' (' || area_type || ')' AS __text FROM station_areas ORDER BY __text

list.definition: SELECT 'all' AS station_owner UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT station_owner FROM stations WHERE station_owner IS NOT NULL ORDER BY station_owner
list.label: Agency
list.name: owner
list.query: SELECT 'all' AS station_owner UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT station_owner FROM stations WHERE station_owner IS NOT NULL ORDER BY station_owner

list.definition: SELECT 'all' AS sid UNION ALL SELECT sid FROM stations ORDER BY sid
list.label: Station
list.name: station
list.query: SELECT 'all' AS sid UNION ALL SELECT sid FROM stations ORDER BY sid

list.definition: SELECT 'all' AS receiver_type UNION ALL SELECT 'NONE' AS receiver_type UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT receiver_type FROM stations WHERE receiver_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY receiver_type
list.label: Receiver
list.name: receiver
list.query: SELECT 'all' AS receiver_type UNION ALL SELECT 'NONE' AS receiver_type UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT receiver_type FROM stations WHERE receiver_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY receiver_type

list.definition: SELECT 'all' AS antenna_type UNION ALL SELECT 'NONE' AS antenna_type UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT antenna_type FROM stations WHERE antenna_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY antenna_type
list.label: Antenna
list.name: antenna
list.query: SELECT 'all' AS antenna_type UNION ALL SELECT 'NONE' AS antenna_type UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT antenna_type FROM stations WHERE antenna_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY antenna_type
